title: Message forwarding → disk quota exceeded → 507
evidence: All 9 TC-032 tests passed in 1692ms (439/439 suite total): - disk_quota_exceeded=1 → POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 507 `{ok: false, error: 'Disk quota exceeded'}` - No MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event written when blocked by quota - disk_quota_exceeded=0 (cleared) → POST /v1/tenants/:id/message returns 200 `{ok: true}` with mocked fetch - MESSAGE_DELIVERED audit event written with correct slackEventId `E_TC032_OK`
